description: Initial screen state: Browser window open to Askable Sessions page. A message "Please click the screen sharing button that appears, and choose the option to share this window." is displayed.

description: The text on the screen updates to "Perfect!".

description: Task instructions are being displayed on the screen line by line, explaining that the user will be shown a prototype with new filtering features.

description: Instructions for the think aloud protocol are being displayed, asking the user to share their thoughts and describe what they see.

description: Final instruction message appears: "I'm going to open the website in your browser now."
